name: sysGetOrigTimeNS
title: sysGetOrigTimeNS
description: Returns the original time stamp of the last update to the variable value, before time synchronization may have changed it.

parameters.name: SysVarName
parameters.description: Name of the fully qualified name of the system variable, including all name spaces, separated by "::". The name must be preceded by "sysVar::".

return: Original time stamp of the last update to the variable value in nanoseconds since measurement start.
